articles.title: Bruins fall to Maple Leafs 4-2 at TD Garden
articles.description:

articles.title: Another crop of Boston College NFL hopefuls get a chance to shine at Eagles’ annual Pro Day
articles.description:
With Boston College nearby, and Bill O’Brien as a close friend, Mike Vrabel and the Patriots have plenty of intel when it comes to monitoring local players potentially worth drafting. Even so, it never hurts to compile additional data, and Monday’s Pro Day gave the Patriots — along with 29 other teams — another opportunity […]
